reasoning: The highest-grossing movie of 2025 is effectively guaranteed to be a franchise film. The Chinese animated sequel 'Ne Zha 2' has already shattered box office records in early 2025, grossing over $2 billion globally and becoming one of the top 5 highest-grossing films in history. Because 'Ne Zha 2' is a sequel (and part of the Fengshen Cinematic Universe), it perfectly fits the resolution criteria for a franchise. For an original, non-franchise film to take the #1 spot, it would need to gross well over $2 billion, an incredibly rare feat that no original film is positioned to achieve this year. If any upcoming film does manage to surpass 'Ne Zha 2', the only realistic contenders are other massive franchise titles such as 'Avatar: Fire and Ash', 'Zootopia 2', or 'Jurassic World Rebirth'. Therefore, it is virtually certain that the highest grossing movie of 2025 will be part of a franchise.
